summary: Six of eight results hit, including two direct twins (ranks 7 and 8) explicitly describing handicap-principle costly honesty-signals and stotting-inspired proof-of-work signals on worker responses. With max sem 0.95 and max func 0.95, plus distinct overlapping clusters (TRiSM, collusion detection, BlockAgents Proof-of-Thought, agent-as-judge), the STOT-SIGNAL mechanism is well-covered in prior work and not novel.
